short_description: A long-form Complex interview series in which Speedy Morman explores the never-before-heard stories of musicians, actors and celebrities.

ACTIVE STATUS FLAG: Speedy Morman publicly announced leaving Complex after 10+ years in April 2026 to go independent, so '360 With Speedy' as a Speedy-hosted Complex series appears to be on hiatus/ended - marked inactive pending verification of whether Complex continues the brand. Most recent Speedy-era episodes date to early 2026 (e.g., a Gelo interview ~late Jan 2026). Ad availability uncertain given the host change. Note: Speedy's new independent venture (@speedymorman) is a separate potential future entry, not yet a defined show at research time.
